channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Federal Judge Denies Musk's Request for Injunction Against OpenAI
item.description: A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company, but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: BYD Unveils Revolutionary Drone System for Electric Vehicles - CNET
item.description: BYD, a leading electric vehicle manufacturer, has partnered with DJI to create an innovative drone system called Ling Yuan that can be integrated into its vehicles, allowing for dynamic take-offs and landings. The system is priced at 16,000 yuan (around $2,195) but is currently only available in mainland China.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
